final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section UI mockup for a skincare brand called "LUMEA BEAUTY", feminine beauty industry.

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy feminine aesthetic, floral accents with purple flowers, Figma/Sketch-style high-fidelity wireframe with real copy
Composition: full-width desktop landing page layout, three-column hero section — left text column, center model, right product column — with header bar at top and benefit cards strip at bottom
Subject: complete landing page hero mockup with the following structure —
  • Header: logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left, 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"] centered, CTA button "今すぐ試す" on the right
  • Left column: large headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", three pill-shaped feature badges with small icons ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"], three bullet points with pink checkmarks ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"], two CTA buttons ["初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >"], trust badge strip "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  • Center column: young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of moisturizing boost serum
  • Right column: two product items (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box), three floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]
  • Bottom strip: three horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]
Scene/backdrop: pure white or very light blush background with soft scattered purple floral petal accents, airy and uncluttered
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, bright and clean, warm-neutral color temperature, uplifting and trustworthy feminine mood
Color palette: soft pink as primary brand color anchoring buttons and badges, white as dominant background, purple flower accents as secondary decorative color, gold as stat-card accent, black/dark gray for body text
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese and English text must be legible and correctly rendered; layout must read as a realistic, production-ready desktop landing page at 1792×1008 viewport; pill badges and stat cards must be visually distinct floating elements; CTA buttons must be clearly styled with soft pink fill
Avoid: generic stock-photo collage look, dark or moody backgrounds, cluttered or misaligned UI elements, lorem ipsum placeholder text, missing navigation items, distorted or unreadable Japanese characters, overly ornate decorative borders
